Study/Noctuae Celsum/Books/Book Notes/经济.text: （然而，在传统经济学中，我们知道：
Study/Noctuae Celsum/Books/Book Notes/经济.filePath: Study/Noctuae Celsum/Books/Book Notes/经济人的末日.md

Study/Noctuae Celsum/Books/Book Notes/经济.text: 1. 随着生产的扩大，平均固定成本会被生产稀释，可变成本，理想化状态下即为边际成本，随着商品的生产的增加而增加，直到达到MR=MC 的利润最大化的节点；长期来看，资本的生产会趋向于最低成本线，获得 Economics of Scale，从而进一步降低成本。更进一点的是，马克思在论述这一章的时候，用剩余价值代替生产规模和生产价格进行及其粗略的数学计算，忽略了企业生产成本变化的客观规律。
Study/Noctuae Celsum/Books/Book Notes/经济.filePath: Study/Noctuae Celsum/Books/Book Notes/经济人的末日.md

Study/Noctuae Celsum/Books/Book Notes/经济.text: 2. 在市场的自由竞争中，企业并不是自由进出的，生产壁垒保障者市场的利润；更高昂的生产壁垒会天然催化垄断资本。）
Study/Noctuae Celsum/Books/Book Notes/经济.filePath: Study/Noctuae Celsum/Books/Book Notes/经济人的末日.md

Study/Noctuae Celsum/Books/Book Notes/经济.text: （然而，在传统经济学中，我们知道：宏观经济发展是螺旋式上升的，经济紧缩后会回归经济增长，经济过热后会回归经济通缩。）
Study/Noctuae Celsum/Books/Book Notes/经济.filePath: Study/Noctuae Celsum/Books/Book Notes/经济人的末日.md

Study/UCL Module/24-25/Effect of Collate.text:
, indicating that the effectiveness of monetary policy declines as the financial system becomes more developed. [Financial development and the effectiveness of monetary policy](zotero://select/library/items/4GNZWBJJ)

•*The Autonomy of Monetary Policy Transmission in Emerging Markets*:
- FX matters amplify credit channel
- suggest aggressive and preemptive policy
- We find an important role for the credit and the exchange rate channels. Further, we also find a complementary role for policy tools including Foreign Exchange Intervention (FXI) and liquidity tools. We then explore the spillover effects of external global factors including global monetary policy and global commodity prices on monetary policy transmission in a small open economy such as Malaysia. The results show that while global commodity prices do not impair monetary policy transmission, **global monetary policy tightening could complement domestic efforts to achieve price stability by inducing a global disinflation.** Finally, monetary policy transmission is delayed and weakened in high inflationary environment, with the implication that more aggressive and preemptive policy actions may be needed in such cases. [The Anatomy of Monetary Policy Transmission in an Emerging Market](zotero://select/library/items/9KP9AMH8)

• *Revisiting the monetary transmission mechanism through an industry-level differential approach*:
    [Revisiting the monetary transmission mechanism through an industry-level differential approach](zotero://select/library/items/ZXA9N3XT) 
    - hignly rely on collateralized assets
